Description

io.graphite.result

    Classes in io.graphite.print.formatter that implement Colors
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    CompactFormatter
    Formats a graph using Graphite's default compact representation.
    final class 
    DotFormatter
    Formats a graph using the Graphviz DOT language.
    final class 
    EdgeListFormatter
    Formats a graph as an edge list.
    final class 
    JsonFormatter
    Formats a graph as a JSON document.
    final class 
    MatrixFormatter
    Formats a graph as an adjacency matrix.
    final class 
    MermaidFormatter
    Formats a graph using Mermaid diagram syntax.
    final class 
    StatisticsFormatter
    Formats graph metadata and structural statistics.
    final class 
    TreeFormatter
